name_en: B's latest bucket bag, made of cotton twill. Crafted in an Italian workshop, adorned with jacquard B's exclusive check pattern. Unlined design, lightweight. Features smooth calfskin trim and an adjustable shoulder strap, allowing you to switch between shoulder and crossbody styles. A must-have style. 17.5 x 10.5 x 20cm
